import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_CooperateBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) CooperateBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_CooperateBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) CooperateBot DefectBot = some (.C, .D) := by
  rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_DefectBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) DefectBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  unfold outcome
  rw [play_DefectBot]
  rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.MirrorBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_MirrorBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) MirrorBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  have hA : play (n+3) MirrorBot CooperateBot = some .C := by
    show eval (n+3) MirrorBot CooperateBot MirrorBot = some .C
    simp [eval, MirrorBot, CooperateBot, Prog.subst]
  have hB : play (n+3) CooperateBot MirrorBot = some .C := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.MirrorBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_MirrorBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) MirrorBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  have hA : play (n+3) MirrorBot DefectBot = some .D := by
    show eval (n+3) MirrorBot DefectBot MirrorBot = some .D
    simp [eval, MirrorBot, DefectBot, Prog.subst]
  have hB : play (n+3) DefectBot MirrorBot = some .D := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.OBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_OBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+5) OBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  have hA : play (n+5) OBot CooperateBot = some .C := by
    show eval (n+5) OBot CooperateBot OBot = some .C
    unfold OBot CooperateBot
    simp [eval, Prog.subst]
    decide
  have hB : play (n+5) CooperateBot OBot = some .C := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_DBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) DBot CooperateBot = some (.D, .C) := by
  have hGuard : eval (n+2) DBot CooperateBot (.sim .opp (.bot DefectBot)) = some .C := by
    simp [eval, Prog.subst, CooperateBot]
  have hA : play (n+3) DBot CooperateBot = some .D := by
    have hPlay := play_ite_from_guard
      n 2 DBot CooperateBot (.sim .opp (.bot DefectBot))
      (.const Action.D) (.const Action.C)
      Action.C Action.C
      (by rfl) hGuard
    simpa [eval] using hPlay
  have hB : play (n+3) CooperateBot DBot = some .C := rfl
  exact outcome_of_plays _ _ _ _ _ hA hB

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.TitForTatBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers

open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem TitForTatBot_plays_C_against_CooperateBot (fuel : Nat) :
    play (fuel + 3) TitForTatBot CooperateBot = some .C := by
  apply play_from_eval
  unfold TitForTatBot CooperateBot
  simp [eval, Prog.subst]
  decide

theorem outcome_TitForTatBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) TitForTatBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  have hA : play (n + 3) TitForTatBot CooperateBot = some .C :=
    TitForTatBot_plays_C_against_CooperateBot n
  have hB : play (n + 3) CooperateBot TitForTatBot = some .C := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.TitForTatBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_TitForTatBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) TitForTatBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  have hA : play (n+3) TitForTatBot DefectBot = some .D := by
    show eval (n+3) TitForTatBot DefectBot TitForTatBot = some .D
    unfold TitForTatBot DefectBot CooperateBot
    simp [eval, Prog.subst]
    decide
  have hB : play (n+3) DefectBot TitForTatBot = some .D := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.EBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.MirrorBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_EBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) EBot CooperateBot = some (.D, .C) := by
  have hCB : play (n+1) CooperateBot (.bot DefectBot) = some .C := rfl
  have hGuard1 :
      eval (n+2) EBot CooperateBot (.sim .opp (.bot DefectBot)) = some .C :=
    eval_sim_opp_bot_of_play (n+1) EBot CooperateBot DefectBot Action.C hCB
  have hA : play (n+3) EBot CooperateBot = some .D := by
    have hPlay := play_ite_from_guard
      n 2 EBot CooperateBot (.sim .opp (.bot DefectBot))
      (.const Action.D)
      (.ite (.sim .opp (.bot CooperateBot)) Action.C (.const Action.C)
        (.ite (.sim .opp (.bot MirrorBot)) Action.C (.const Action.C) (.const Action.D)))
      Action.C Action.C
      (by unfold EBot; rfl) hGuard1
    simpa [eval] using hPlay
  have hB : play (n+3) CooperateBot EBot = some .C := rfl
  exact outcome_of_plays _ _ _ _ _ hA hB

end PDNew.Theorems
